programme.title: TBH 210
programme.desc: TBH 210

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: The Cannonball and its primary passenger Uncle Joe are pelted with eggs after the Hooterville Hornets coached by Uncle Joe are drubbed in what may be their worst game ever Another unexpected passenger on that run is Homer Bedloe who despite being hit with a couple of eggs himself is surprisingly cordial and pleasant

programme.title: Munsters 117
programme.desc: Munsters 117

programme.title: Addams Family 110
programme.desc: Addams Family 110

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Isaacs Ted Lange favorite singer Roxy Blue Diahann Carroll becomes his lover Talky Robert Tanners Jim Nabors popularity increases when fellow passengers think he may be a jewel thief Bert Fredericks David Groh plans his wife Denises Michele Lee birthday party but she thinks its a murder plot

programme.title: Daktari 326
programme.desc: Daktari 326

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: When Jonathan buys Jennifer a gorgeous old car for her birthday she is less than thrilled -- but two Brits seem suspiciously eager to take it off her hands

programme.title: Cagney and Lacey
programme.desc: Mary Beth is the star witness in a trial that turns out not to be the slam dunk the prosecutors thought it was Meanwhile Chris and Mary Beth try to convince a rape witness to not back out of testifying

programme.title: Starsky and Hutch
programme.desc: Starsky and Hutch pose as recreation officers aboard a luxury ocean liner filled with swinging singles tourists and an alarming collection of crime syndicate chieftains in the two-hour Murder at Sea The murder of a ships officer takes on an air of intrigue when a young female travel agent for the ship SS Amapola is also discovered slain Starsky and Hutch suspect a smuggling operation aboard the luxury liner and persuade a reluctant Captain LaRue to let them on board as undercover recreation staffers Hack and Zack At sea Starsky and Hutch entertain the tourists and discover that several top bosses in the crime syndicate are aboard for a major conference

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: Archangel sends Hawke and Santini to help FIRM double-agent Vladimir Moses Rostoff escape the Soviet Union He is in possession of a lethal neurotoxin developed by Russian scientists that is valuable to the FIRM but complicates the mission by refusing to leave without his wife and daughter Tanya and Natalia Airwolf s fuel consumption rates mean that she cannot cover the requisite distance with the extra weight of three passengers and pick them up form a residetial area Hawke and Santini can only make up the difference by removing the weapons systems leaving the helicopter unarmed as it flies through hostile Soviet territory

programme.title: Bullwinkle 532
programme.desc: Bullwinkle 532

programme.title: Rocky and Bullwinkle
programme.desc: Rocky and Bullwinkle

programme.title: Petticoat Junction S07E03
programme.desc: Petticoat Junction S07E03

programme.title: Petticoat Junction S07E10
programme.desc: Petticoat Junction S07E10

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Knight 305
programme.desc: Knight 305

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A psychiatrist secretly accounts her miraculous success rate to a unique antique radio that delivers cures and advice during the nightly news

programme.title: Chopping Mall
programme.desc: A group of young shopping mall employees stay behind for a late night party in one of the stores When the mall goes on lock-down before they can get out the robot security system malfunctions and goes on a killing spree

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Two virginal teenagers lust after a goth girl whos obsessed with Freddy Krueger

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Peggy wants to make sure her honeymoon turns out perfect

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Jonas has been forced into mandatory retirement He cant relax though because Anitas friends are driving him crazy

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Cocky lawyer Steve and his passive buddy Brett indulge behave irresponsibly on a cross country joyride and film their exploits After Steve runs down a man on the road and tries to hide it consequences catch up at a remote redneck bar

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A smooth talking vitamin salesman contends with a rival and a mysterious woman he follows home

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks help from college professor Dr Victor Degoethels who has written a book about werewolves throughout the ages But Alamo Joe has already warned him about Eric and his crimes

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Tired and worn out Eric accepts the hospitality of an old man at his home in the woods He becomes attracted to a young woman named Margaret but he fears that he may be responsible for a series of brutal murders in the area

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur Post and his wife Carol move into their first house They find the previous tenants horse abandoned in the backyard barn Carol insists on selling the animal but Wilbur wants to keep it To his surprise the horse agrees with him

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The Posts neighbor Roger catches Mister Ed and Wilbur talking to each other

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan tricks Klink into calling forth a bomber for study but it arrives with a complication - a German general familiar with Hogans style

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Klink reluctantly falls in with two other Kommandants plotting against Burkhalter Burkhalter finds out Now Hogan must step in before Stalag 13 loses Klink the military way - by firing squad

programme.title: Mchale 310
programme.desc: Mchale 310

programme.title: Mchale 324
programme.desc: Mchale 324

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: While on a hike Gomer makes a friend but when the friend decides to move into the barracks Sgt Carter wants him gone! but Gomer shows the Sgt what an asset this new friend is to the platoon

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: After tipping his hat instead of saluting female Captain Iron Pants Martin Gomer is assigned special detail in her office to teach him a lesson But it turns out that he is the teacher instead of the student as he reminds her that she is more then just a Marine

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The professors data indicates that the island is sinking but the men dont want to break the news to the women who have the men in the middle of a landscaping project The Professor ends up hurting his back helping with a rock garden

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways find two crates of silent film equipment in a sunken boat in the lagoon The Professor then comes up with the idea to make a film telling their story send it out on a raft and hope for rescue

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpas innate honesty saves the day when a dishonest real estate speculator tries to buy five unproductive acres of the McCoys land for considerably less than its actual value

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Kate pointedly tells Luke that he is welcome to go fishing with Grandpa and Mac Maginnis and to do whatever he wishes for several nights thereafter but Grandpa steps in to make amends when he realizes that Lukes freedom is causing a genuine strain on their still-young marriage

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Agent 99 accepts a marriage proposal from a handsome and wealthy suitor but Max finds out that he is actually a KAOS agent

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Even during a day off at an amusement park 86 and 99 find a KAOS operation

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ runs afoul of Clearwaters power broker Jason T Rockman when he agrees to take Dr Winters and a group of her mental patients to a local carnival

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Love Boat
programme.desc: Merrills marooned group faces the hurricane while Isaac tries to help the passengers and regain Maras trust Jean gets a surprise while prepping to meet her birth mother

programme.title: WKRP 119
programme.desc: WKRP 119

programme.title: WKRP 106
programme.desc: WKRP 106

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Ava feels there is cause for concern when armed robber Harvey Lujack whom she helped put in prison escapes and swears revenge on her

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: When Kenny Rogers comes to town to visit the Newton family they try to keep his presence a secret

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Bea on final approach of her 1st solo flight sees a murder on the ground Tannna Nelson and Bea go to the home and are met by the wealthy Lyle Jeffries-Patrick Macnee A pool party is taking place so no one believes Bea except Dan

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: A precognitive young woman sees herself being murdered but it is her unknown twin sister who turns up dead

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Dick realizes hes been resting on his laurels as a writer when all of his attempts to get a book published under the pen name Dwight Schmidlapp are met with rejection

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: A new waitress at the Minuteman Cafe comes between Larry Darryl and Darryl Meanwhile George protests Michaels decision to cancel the television stations reruns of Barnaby Jones

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Holowachuk wins the officers tournament and gloats until he finds out Gunny won it so often she stopped playing to give other people a chance at winning and it promptly drives him mad at who is a better pool player

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways fight over their living arrangements as a violent storm approaches the island

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When Arcanes mentor Dr Oliver Duncan is mysteriously killed everyone assumes Arcane is to blame Unfazed Arcane attempts to steal Duncans cold fusion research by romancing his daughter Louise who has plans of her own

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcanes genius is about to be publicly lauded in an autobiographical film But the actor playing him is found murdered in Arcanes trailer Who was the murderer - and was Arcane the intended victim

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The moon is approaching a black hole Professor Bergman is a able to rig up an energy shield around the moonbase but Commander Koenig feels this is only a desperate measure and has an eagle with six personnel dispatched as the rest of the moonbase await certain death

programme.title: Gamera War of the Monsters
programme.desc: Prehistoric monster Gamera returns to wreak havoc on Japan American version of the classic kaiju film Gamera vs Barugon

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: In the series pilot episode cousins Bo and Luke Duke intercept Hazzard County Sheriff Rosco P Coltranes illegal shipment of slot machines then plan to use the proceeds to donate to the Hazzard County Orphanage in Roscos name to ensure his win in an upcoming election against a corrupt opponent

programme.title: Hercules 106
programme.desc: Hercules 106

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Boone and Marquette must find James Pike a mysterious escaped serial killer who rose from the dead

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Mana forces a dying surgeon to conduct experiments on patients in his hospital attempting to implant alien embryos into human hosts

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: When a smooth talking stranger comes to Heath claiming hes his father Heath agrees to travel to the town of his mothers grave to investigate the story

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: Hickok falls in love with a woman who belongs to an unwanted religious group but must first settle an old score with a gunfighter

programme.desc: IMF is tasked with defamation of Janos Karq a dangerous politician from the Eastern Block who intends to start a war with the West Joseph Baresh will be placed in the military prison Lubjanka where his testimonies shall implicate Karq

programme.title: My Science Project
programme.desc: A teen John Stockwell and his girlfriend Danielle von Zerneck raid a military junkyard and find a time-travel contraption from a UFO

programme.title: Godzilla Vs Mechagodzilla II
programme.desc: The United Nations assembles the ultimate weapon to defeat Godzilla while scientists discover a fresh pteranodon egg on a remote Japanese island

programme.title: Beneath the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Time-displaced astronaut Taylor and the mute Nova[a] travel through the desert of the Forbidden Zone in search of a new life away from Ape City Without warning fire shoots up from the ground and chasms open Confused by this Taylor investigates a cliff wall and disappears through it Unable to reach him Nova is left alone

programme.title: Prodigal Boxer 2
programme.desc: Prodigal Boxer 2

programme.title: Invincible Super Chan
programme.desc: Invincible Super Chan
In a totalitarian future society Winston Smith whose daily work is re-writing history tries to rebel by falling in love

programme.title: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: A Real American Hero

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: No Retreat No Surrender
programme.desc: After his father is abused by some thugs a teenager considers Bruce Lees spirit as his teacher Later he trains to become a martial arts professional to avenge his fathers humiliation

programme.title: American Flyers
programme.desc: Marcus takes his kid brother David with him for a physical test and a brain scan suspecting cerebral aneurysm like their dad died of They head off on bikes for the big Rockies bike race with Marcus Sarah driving the van

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks help from college professor Dr Victor Degoethels who has written a book about werewolves throughout the ages But Alamo Joe has already warned him about Eric and his crimes

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Tired and worn out Eric accepts the hospitality of an old man at his home in the woods He becomes attracted to a young woman named Margaret but he fears that he may be responsible for a series of brutal murders in the area

programme.title: Demons
programme.desc: A group of random people are invited to a screening of a mysterious movie only to find themselves trapped in the theater with ravenous demons

programme.title: Cheerleader Camp
programme.desc: A cheerleader Betsy Russell her boyfriend Leif Garrett colleagues and a team mascot Lucinda Dickey attend a competition spoiled by murder

programme.title: Day of the Dead
programme.desc: Trapped in a missile silo a small team of scientists civilians and trigger-happy soldiers battle desperately to ensure the survival of the human race but tension inside the base is reaching breaking-point and the zombies are gathering outside

programme.title: Trilogy of Terror
programme.desc: The same woman Karen Black appears in three tales as a blackmailed teacher a tormented lover and opposite sisters

programme.title: Night of the Zombies
programme.desc: Investigators search for soldiers missing bodies and hear unbelievable rumors about zombies Dismissing those rumors they set out to investigate After two men are found dead CIA special-agent Nick Monroe is sent to flush out what are suspected to be deserters from the old US Army Chemical Corps unit Nicks ruthless investigation uncovers a ghoulish plot of world domination but first he must escape the horror that does not want to be known yet!

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kid Icarus feels awful because his height is a problem Duke discovers a magic lamp and the genie grants Kid Icaruss wish to become bigger Kid Icarus turns into a giant and comes to realize that being bigger has a lot of disadvantages

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Dragon Lord and Mother Brain try to turn every dragon evil The N team rescues Puff a white last good dragon baby

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Their mystic weapons start to fail them Dungeon Master tells his pupils they need to be recharged in the Hall of Bones But first they must find a guide to the Hall

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters a unicorn being attacked They manage to help the Unicorn but Uni is captured by a wizard who is capturing Unicorns and stealing their magical horns They must stop the wizard before he become even more powerful than Venger

programme.desc: A captured Cy-Kill is held temporarily on a remote prison planet Elba while a new Brainstorming device is readied; Fitor plots to rescue his cohort by defecting to the Guardians

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Neron captures the Herculoids to fight gladiatorial battles in his arenaThe Temple of Trax seems to be abandoned In reality the high priest has a plan to kidnap Tara and sacrifice her for the return of Trax after 2000 years

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: In search of a message from Audric Jayce lands on a planet protected by telepathic plants which keep the planet concealed Saw Boss makes a deal with a wicket wizard who has put a sleeping spell on the princess who controls the plants

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: By using a lock of Audrics hair Saw Boss creates a clone which tricks Jayce into a trap Gillian suspects the truth and convinces Jayce to leave the root behind as a precaution Jayce is captured and a clone of Jayce is sent back for the root

programme.desc: VENOM steals the Book of Power which is the key to the Lost City of Mong Paco and its giant jewel-covered idol
